title: NodeManifest
description:
A node manifest (`dora-node.yml`).

Holds only what native package manifests *cannot*: dora contracts and dora
wiring. Name, version, license, and dependencies are read from
`pyproject.toml`/`Cargo.toml` at publish time where possible.

categories.description: Categories from the fixed list (spec §7.6); drive search facets.

description.description: One-line description, shown by `dora hub search`/`info`.

dora.description: Supported dora version range (semver requirement, e.g. `>=0.4`).

entrypoint.description:
What to run, relative to the node's working dir.

Python: a console script on the managed-env PATH (e.g. `dora-yolo`).
Rust/C/C++: the build output, e.g. `target/release/dora-yolo`.
Must be a relative path without `..` components.

env.description:
Documented + typed configuration surface (environment variables).
Security-sensitive names (`PATH`, `PYTHONPATH`, `LD_*`, `DYLD_*`) are
rejected at validation.

example.description: Example dataflow snippet shown by `dora hub info` (YAML node list).

inputs.description: Typed input ports. May be empty (source nodes).

name.description:
Package name. Defaults to `[project].name` / `[package].name` of the
native manifest at publish time; required for standalone validation.

namespace.description: Index namespace the package publishes under (a GitHub org or user).

outputs.description: Typed output ports. May be empty (sink nodes).

platforms.description:
Optional platform allowlist, e.g. `[linux-x86_64, macos-aarch64]`.
Empty means all platforms.

requirements.description:
Informational hardware/system requirements; surfaced by `dora hub
info` and at build start, never auto-installed.

types.description:
Custom type definitions shipped with the node, keyed by full URN
(e.g. `acme/lidar/v1/PointCloud`). Must live under the package's
namespace; `std/` is rejected.

Category.description: Fixed category list (spec §7.6). Extended by index PR + discussion.

default.description: Default value used when the variable is not set in the dataflow.

EnvVarType.description: Declared value type of an environment variable.

FieldDef.description: A field definition within a struct type.

nullable.description: Whether the field is nullable (default: true)

type.description: Arrow type name or URN reference

MetadataDef.description: Metadata key required on outputs of a given type.

key.description: Key name that must be present in message metadata

PortDef.description: A typed input or output port.

required.description:
Whether a dataflow must wire this input (defaults to `true`; only
meaningful on inputs — validation rejects it on outputs).

type.description:
Type URN (e.g. `std/media/v1/Image`). Omitted = untyped; validation
skips the port.

Requirements.description:
Informational hardware/system requirements (spec §5): documentation
surfaced by `dora hub info`, never auto-installed.

hardware.description: Hardware requirements, e.g. `[cuda]`. v1 actively probes only `cuda`.

system.description: System package requirements, keyed by package manager or platform.

TypeDef.description: A single type definition from the standard type library.

fields.description: Struct field definitions (only for Struct arrow types)

TypeParam.description: A type parameter declaration (e.g. `sample_type` on AudioFrame).

default.description: Default value (used when parameter is not specified)
